TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Maia, title = Maia, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Maia} }

S.FORM: alang Maia (Mangacun, Mangacun, 瑪雅部落) ga niya mki sku Takaw Si atu Namasya Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 218 buwan, 788 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 757 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 31 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 60%, Paywan 5%, Tayan 3%, Amis 1%, Cou 10%, Hla'aluwa 7%, Kanakanabu 9%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Maia hya' ga Nangnisalu. tay mkraya' na Maia hya' ga Takanua. rekisi kayal qalang ru cingay qalax qu kayal nya'. kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh tuqi qsya' ki rrhzyal giway rgrgyax kwara' qalang. 'llaw balay ktan qu qalang myan. baqun tmnga' kwara' rgryax nya'. tuqi 'san ungat kisya' nya'. "basu'" qu spzyang glgang nha qalang musa' ana inu'.

alang Maia (Mangacun, Mangacun, 瑪雅部落) ga niya mki sku Takaw Si atu Namasya Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 218 buwan, 788 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 757 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 31 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 60%, Paywan 5%, Tayan 3%, Amis 1%, Cou 10%, Hla'aluwa 7%, Kanakanabu 9%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Maia hya' ga Nangnisalu. tay mkraya' na Maia hya' ga Takanua. rekisi kayal qalang ru cingay qalax qu kayal nya'. kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh tuqi qsya' ki rrhzyal giway rgrgyax kwara' qalang. 'llaw balay ktan qu qalang myan. baqun tmnga' kwara' rgryax nya'. tuqi 'san ungat kisya' nya'. "basu'" qu spzyang glgang nha qalang musa' ana inu'.
S.PHON: alaŋ maia (maŋaʦ~ʨun, maŋaʦ~ʨun, ****) ɣa nija mki s~ɕku takaw s~ɕi atu namas~ɕja ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, pajwan *%, tajan *%, amis~ɕ *%, ʦ~ʨou **%, ħlaʔaluwa *%, kanakanaβu *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkjaħuʔ na maia ħjaʔ ɣa naŋnis~ɕalu. taj mkrajaʔ na maia ħjaʔ ɣa takanua. rekis~ɕi kajal qalaŋ ru ʦ~ʨiŋaj qalax qu kajal njaʔ. kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ tuqi qs~ɕjaʔ ki rrħzjal ɣiwaj rɣrɣjax kwaraʔ qalaŋ. ʔllaw βalaj ktan qu qalaŋ mjan. βaqun tmŋaʔ kwaraʔ rɣrjax njaʔ. tuqi ʔs~ɕan uŋat kis~ɕjaʔ njaʔ. "βas~ɕuʔ" qu s~ɕpzjaŋ ɣlɣaŋ nħa qalaŋ mus~ɕaʔ ana inuʔ.
